hopeful.lighting: bright coastal daylight with warm coral highlights and clean white sparkle
hopeful.camera: forward tracking shot from workday pressure into open beach air
hopeful.environment: sunlit shoreline and open summer sky

excited.lighting: high-key summer pop light with coral-orange accents and crisp white highlights
excited.camera: rhythmic lateral tracking with buoyant percussion-timed cuts
excited.environment: bright beach deck and tropical pop stage energy

hope.lighting: golden daylight bloom over blue water with soft coral rim light
hope.camera: slow crane rise toward open sky and sparkling water

anxious.lighting: cool office light breaking into warm coastal daylight
anxious.camera: tight interior push-out into a wider exterior frame
anxious.environment: workday interior giving way to seaside daylight

profiles.motif_template: sunlit wave arcs and {main_color} shell glints marking release from routine

extra_locations.location: bright workday room opening toward vacation daylight
shoreline edge under bright summer sky

section_actions.Intro: lets the first sea-breeze rhythm reveal {prop}, standing relaxed in bright vacation light
section_actions.Chorus: runs into the sea breeze with open shoulders, lifting {prop} toward the sunlit water
section_actions.Bridge: breathes deeply under the blue sky, shoulders relaxing as {prop} glows steady in the breeze
section_actions.Outro: opens both arms to the shoreline wind, {prop} settling into a bright final summer glint

action_rules.action: walks barefoot along warm sand, laughing freely as {prop} flashes with wave-reflected light
steps toward the open door with a packed vacation bag, {prop} swinging in bright anticipation
turns away from the workday screen toward open daylight, {prop} catching the first warm breeze

profiles.default_action: moves with relaxed summer-pop energy, {prop} flashing gently with the tropical rhythm

focus_rules.focus: workday pressure dissolving into a strip of beach daylight
steel-drum sparkle skipping across bright water
warm sand, wave foam, and sea breeze moving around the shell charm
vacation freedom carried by coral shell glints

movement_patterns.Intro: gentle push-in with sea-breeze parallax and soft percussion shimmer
movement_patterns.Verse: light walking track with buoyant shoulder motion and sunlit foreground wipes
movement_patterns.Chorus: bright forward rush with wave-synced cuts and open-sky camera lift
movement_patterns.Bridge: slow breath-led tilt upward into blue sky, then a warm release
movement_patterns.Outro: slow pullback over sparkling water and coral sunset glow
movement_patterns.default: smooth tropical pop motion with readable beat accents
